tools.name: get_my_profile
tools.title: Get my Hoops profile
tools.description: Return the signed-in user's Hoops profile: username, height, vertical, weight, and last known location freshness.

tools.name: list_my_leagues
tools.title: List my leagues
tools.description: List all Hoops leagues the signed-in user is a member of, with league id, name, and join code.

tools.name: list_nearby_players
tools.title: List nearby hoopers
tools.description: List other Hoops players with fresh locations (checked in within the last 3 days), sorted by distance from the signed-in user.

radius_km.description: Search radius in kilometers. Defaults to 25 km.

limit.description: Maximum number of players to return. Defaults to 20.

tools.name: list_nearby_courts
tools.title: List nearby courts
tools.description: List basketball courts near the signed-in user, ordered by distance, with a count of hoopers currently checked in at each court.

radius_km.description: Search radius in kilometers. Defaults to 25 km.

limit.description: Maximum number of courts to return. Defaults to 20.
